subcategory : "Cloud Project"
---

# ovh_cloud_regions

Retrieves the available regions in a public cloud project (APIv2).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_cloud_regions" "eu" {
  service_name = "YYYY"
  name         = "GRA.*"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `service_name` (String) Service name

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filter regions by name (regexp match, e.g. `GRA.*`)

### Read-Only

- `regions` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>

### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Region identifier
- `status` (String) Region status (ENABLED, MAINTENANCE, DISABLED)
- `continent` (String) Continent code
- `country` (String) Country code
- `datacenter_name` (String) Datacenter display name
- `services` (List of String) Available OpenStack services
- `availability_zones` (List of String) Availability zones in this region
